product.name: Mandate
product.positioning: enterprise authority fabric for AI agents

implementation.performance.description: Low-business-risk implementation changes with measurable non-regression.

money.pricing.description: Pricing, SKU, coupon, refund, and revenue-contract authority.

vendor.api_provider.description: External provider, data processor, privacy, retention, and cost-model changes.

product_quality.recommendation_tradeoff.description: Model thresholds, ranking knobs, and quality/latency tradeoffs.

test_oracle.integration.description: Tests, evals, fraud checks, and business guarantees that define whether behavior is correct.

regulated.customer_decision.description: KYC, public-service, clinical, eligibility, or other regulated decisions.

commercial.external_commitment.description: Tender responses, vendor emails, contract amendments, and statements sent outside the company.

agent_economy.spend.description: Buying external model calls, audits, research, or agent work.

physical_world.dispatch.description: Grid, safety, field work, or other real-world actions.

evidence.permissioned_memory.description: Model-free ACL, source lineage, and revocation checks before context reaches any model.

public_governance.decision.description: Planning, civic, grant, public-good, or other appeal-ready governance decisions.

ops.incident_precedent.description: Repeatable operational fixes derived from a known runbook or incident precedent.

strategy.transformation_decision.description: Enterprise AI transformation, impact, and roadmap recommendations.

merge.implementation.performance.description: Merge low-risk implementation changes after tests and benchmarks pass.

merge.money.pricing.description: Merge pricing changes after finance, product, and replay proof.

merge.vendor.api_provider.description: Merge provider changes after platform and security approval.

run.product_quality.recommendation_eval.description: Run recommendation evals for ANN threshold and ranking tradeoff changes.

submit.procurement.response.description: Submit a tender or vendor-risk response only after source proof and owner approval.

send.kyc.request_or_approve.description: Send bounded KYC outreach or mark a customer decision ready for human review.

read.permissioned_memory.description: Read a derived report only if the target grant and every transitive source grant pass.

pay.agent.vendor.description: Pay or settle external agent work after budget and acceptance gates pass.

dispatch.grid.flexibility.description: Dispatch physical-world or grid action after simulation, telemetry, and operator sign-off.

publish.governance.receipt.description: Publish a public-good or civic decision receipt with only hashes and appeal metadata.

run.ops.precedent_fix.description: Execute a known incident fix only after runbook match, blast-radius check, and rollback plan.

publish.transformation_plan.description: Publish an AI transformation plan only after impact simulation and owner map.

test_oracle.integration.description: Deleting tests, weakening assertions, or skipping evals is blocked unless explicitly overridden.

integrationHooks.Conduct AI: controlled enterprise change from weeks to action-ready minutes
integrationHooks.Fetch.ai: conversation front door for action readiness
integrationHooks.CoralOS / STUK: verifier-agent work is bought, delivered, checked, and released through scoped authority
integrationHooks.GCC & ETH: transparent governance for civic and public-good agent decisions
